capacity: 24,000 lbs each (with 15" forks) / 22,000 lbs each (with 22" forks)

tire_dimension_fields.dim_w: Fork width at tire end view

installation_requirements.circuit_breaker_recommendation: 1.5 to 2 times the sum of the full load amps for all posts in the system
installation_requirements.final_electrical_connection: Responsibility of the electrical contractor per local/national code
installation_requirements.connection_notes: More than one point of connection may be required. Disconnect switches, main fuses, and main power leads are NOT provided by Mohawk Resources Ltd.
installation_requirements.shipping: All MP-24 and MP-30 lifts ship on low-deck trailers assembled

features: Fork width adjustable from 10 5/8" min to 28 1/8" max
